subcodes.first_line: This is a mention from Our presence unto him who hath attained unto the lights of faith, when heedlessness had seized the dwellers of earth and heaven, save him who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن فاز بانوار الایمان اذ اخذت الغفله سکان الارض و السماء الا من
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @knowledge; recognition of God, @living waters; water of life, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
